summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Blogs 4 Blocks blogging platform. Backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate), frontend functionality working well with minor display issue in latest posts section.

ui_bugs.issue: Posts grid only displays 1 post card instead of expected 6, despite API returning correct data
ui_bugs.details: Grid has 6 post links but only renders 1 BlogCard component. Likely issue with BlogCard component mapping or rendering logic.

passed_tests: Homepage loads with hero section and rainbow title
Categories grid displays all 7 categories correctly
Navigation bar with topics dropdown functional
Post detail pages load with full content and author info
Guest post submission works without authentication
About page loads with all sections
Write page form submission creates posts successfully
Auth page with login/register tabs functional
Guest post expiry notice displays correctly
Subcategory filters work on category pages
All API endpoints return correct data (12 seeded posts, 7 categories, stats)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix BlogCard rendering issue in HomePage latest posts section - posts data is fetched correctly but only 1 card displays instead of 6. Check BlogCard component mapping in HomePage.js around line 230-233.
